privileged_info_summary: The task relies on 5 real photographs sourced from Unsplash via Lorem Picsum with IDs 1018, 1033, 1039, 1044, and 1029. It requires the creation of a published WordPress page titled 'Urban Photography Portfolio' containing a specific introductory text and all 5 images with exact corresponding alt text assignments. These constraints are independently verified by checking the setup_task.sh download process and the verifier.py scoring logic.
